tool.name: MINTmap
tool.description: Generate tRNA-derived fragments' profile from small RNA-seq data
tool.command:
##set -euxo pipefail &&
#set $l_table = $lookup_table if $lookup_table else ($__tool_directory__ + "/default_files/LookupTable.tRFs.MINTmap_v1.txt") #set $o_types = $trf_types if $trf_types else ($__tool_directory__ + "/default_files/OtherAnnotations.MINTmap_v1.txt") #set $s_ref = $reference_trna if $reference_trna else ($__tool_directory__ + "/default_files/tRNAspace.Spliced.Sequences.MINTmap_v1.fa")
perl \$CONDA_PREFIX/share/java/mintmap/MINTmap.pl -f $input_fastq -p $output_prefix -l $l_table -s $s_ref -o $o_types -a $assembly -j \$CONDA_PREFIX/share/java/mintmap/MINTplates/ && pwd && ls -alt . ##mv "${output_prefix}-MINTmap_v1-ambiguous-tRFs.countsmeta.txt" out_ambig_countsmeta.txt && ##mv "${output_prefix}-MINTmap_v1-ambiguous-tRFs.expression.html" out_ambig_expr_html.html && ##mv "${output_prefix}-MINTmap_v1-ambiguous-tRFs.expression.txt" out_ambig_expr_txt.txt && ##mv "${output_prefix}-MINTmap_v1-exclusive-tRFs.countsmeta.txt" out_exclu_countsmeta.txt && ##mv "${output_prefix}-MINTmap_v1-exclusive-tRFs.expression.html" out_exclu_expr_html.html && ##mv "${output_prefix}-MINTmap_v1-exclusive-tRFs.expression.txt" out_exclu_expr_txt.txt

param.name: input_fastq
param.help: Input FASTQ file containing small RNA-seq reads.
param.label: Input FASTQ file

data.name: out_ambig_countsmeta
data.label: ${tool.name} on ${on_string}: High level mapping stats for non-exclusive tRFs profiles

data.name: out_exclu_countsmeta
data.label: ${tool.name} on ${on_string}: High level mapping stats for exclusive tRFs profiles

tool.help: MINTmap identifies and quantifies tRNA-derived fragments (tRFs) from small RNA sequencing datasets.
